bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent’s initial all-valueE offer gives me low utility and does not yet show meaningful concession patterns, so I will anchor on my strongest values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is very early, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid rather than conceding substantially. The opponent has repeated the same all-valueE offer, which gives me low utility and shows no concession yet, so I will make only a tiny change from my prior top bid to avoid exact repetition while preserving my key high-weight issues.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent has mostly held at all valueE, with only a slight move on issueC, so I will hold firm on my important issues A, B, and C while offering valueE on issueD, which they have consistently proposed.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.83 because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has only moved slightly, improving issueC from valueE to valueD while holding the rest at valueE, so I will reciprocate modestly on low-weight issues while keeping my most important issues strong.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent has barely conceded, moving only issueC from valueE to valueD while keeping the rest at valueE, so I will hold firm on my most important issues and continue offering issueD=valueE as a concession they may prefer.

I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.10 and the opponent has only made a small concession on issueC while otherwise holding firm at valueE. Since my highest-weight issues are issueA, issueB, and issueC, I keep my preferred values there and make only a tiny concession on low-weight issueE compared with my prior top bid to avoid simply repeating the last offer.

At t=0.12 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making limited concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held around valueE but has recently moved issueC and issueA slightly, so I will hold firm on my most important issueA and issueB while offering valueE on low-weight issueD and issueE to improve acceptability without dropping too far.

At t=0.14 this is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only low-cost concessions. The opponent has mostly held near valueE on all issues, with only small movement on issueC and issueA, so I will keep my high-weight issues A, B, and C at my preferred values and concede on a lower-weight issue to avoid repeating my last bid.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for myself while making a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and mostly fixed around valueE, with only limited movement on issueC/issueA, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues A, B, and C while offering issueD=valueE as a concession.

At t=0.18 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only modest concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has barely conceded and their offers remain low for me, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A, B, and C while varying a low-importance issue to avoid repeating my last bid.

At t=0.20 I am still targeting a strong utility bid around 0.80, since it is early enough not to make major concessions on high-weight issues issueA, issueB, and issueC. The opponent’s offers are valid but still low for me, with only modest concessions on issueC and issueD, so I concede on lower-weight issueD and issueE while holding my most important values.

At t=0.22 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held firm around valueE, with only limited movement on issueC/issueD, so I am not ready to concede major issues like issueA, issueB, or issueC yet, but I can offer valueE on issueD and issueE to explore compromise.

At t=0.24 it is still early enough to protect the high-weight issues, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.80+ while still making concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held near valueE/valueD and their offers remain low for me, with only small concessions on issueC and issueD, so I will keep issueA, issueB, and issueC at my best values while varying a low-weight issue to avoid simply repeating my last bid.

At t=0.26 there is still time, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions on lower-weight issues. At t=0.28 it is still early enough to target a high-utility bid for me, around 0.80 on the weighted scale, while making concessions on lower-weight issues. At t=0.30 I am still targeting a strong utility but making a meaningful concession from my earlier near-maximal bids, aiming around 0.68 utility. I am targeting a utility around 0.71, making moderate concessions on lower-weight issues while holding firm on issueA and issueB, which are most valuable to me.
